name: DLA Copper Deposition
description: Procedural diffusion-limited aggregation copper dendrite growth. Domain-warped fBm noise simulates random walker deposition with stick probability, producing metallic branching structures with oxidation patina and electrolyte depletion fields.

params.name: Growth Scale
params.description: Controls the overall strength of the generated effect.

params.name: Arm Count
params.description: Controls animation and temporal evolution speed.

params.name: Oxidation
params.description: Controls spatial scale, frequency, or detail contrast.

params.name: Spark Intensity
params.description: Controls mouse-driven or secondary variation influence.
